sub_topic: AVO Flow v2.1 Architecture / Staking Mechanism
summary_50w: AVO Flow v2.1 defines a staking collateral mechanism for converting AVO Points to AVO Tokens. The architecture separates the system into an on-chain layer (AVOStaking.sol managing collateral, lock-up, pools), an off-chain layer (backend managing AVO Points, Trust Score, Clan Rating, conversion limits, APR), and a treasury layer (separate wallet for payouts and rewards). The smart contract only handles principal, not treasury or rewards.

AVOStaking.sol is a smart contract for staking user principal within the 100TRUST architecture. It does not store treasury or pay APR; rewards are handled by an external backend based on emitted events. Features include Ownable, Pausable, and ReentrancyGuard, ensuring secure and controlled staking operations.
